tasks.title: Validate system health checks (4/5 passing)
tasks.description: Run health check suite: verify orchestrator, dashboard, agents, watchdog, cron. Accept if >=4/5 pass.
tasks.success_criteria: 4/5 health checks passing, logged to system_health.json
tasks.test_command: python3 orchestrator/health_check.py > /dev/null 2>&1; python3 -c "import json; s=json.load(open('reports/system_health.json')); print('PASS' if s.get('passed', 0) >= 4 else 'FAIL')"

projects.name: Dashboard Quality & State Management
projects.description: Fix missing state fields and implement schema validation

tasks.title: Validate dashboard quality tracking
tasks.description: Run dashboard quality validation: verify state.json has all required fields. Accept if schema valid.
tasks.success_criteria: state.json passes schema validation, all fields present
tasks.test_command: python3 -c "from orchestrator.schema_validator import read_state_safe; s=read_state_safe(); print('PASS' if 'quality' in s else 'FAIL')"

projects.name: Policy Enforcement & Budget Control
projects.description: Wire token/rescue budget limits and model routing

tasks.title: Validate token enforcement (rescue limits)
tasks.description: Run token enforcer validation: verify 1-rescue-per-session limit is enforced. Accept if limits work.
tasks.success_criteria: Token enforcer blocks rescue after 1 use, logged to token_decisions.jsonl

projects.name: Multi-Loop Execution & Self-Improvement
projects.description: Implement DAG + parallel + memory + self-improve for multi-pass execution

tasks.title: Validate task persistence layer
tasks.description: Run persistence validation: verify completed tasks stay in projects.json. Accept if results persist.
tasks.success_criteria: Task status persists across orchestrator runs

projects.name: Local Agent Autonomy Setup
projects.description: Set up routing and task dispatch for fully autonomous execution

tasks.title: Validate error recovery (stuck task retry)
tasks.description: Run retry validation: verify stuck tasks timeout and reset. Accept if auto-retry works.
tasks.success_criteria: In-progress tasks reset to pending after 300s timeout

projects.name: P0 Blockers — Unblock Task Execution (URGENT)
projects.description: Fix 6 critical blockers preventing local agents from executing tasks. Must complete within 12 hours.

tasks.title: P0: Fix task state persistence — results must update projects.json
tasks.description: After each agent completes a task, orchestrator must persist: status='completed', quality_score, elapsed_time, result summary. Currently agent results are lost and tasks never transition from in_progress. Test: run_version() with any pending task, verify projects.json status updates and quality is non-zero.
tasks.success_criteria: At least 1 task transitions from pending→completed in projects.json; quality_score is non-zero

tasks.title: P0: Fix task router stuck-task logic — retry in_progress > 5 min
tasks.description: Currently projects_loader.py skips all in_progress tasks forever, so they get stuck. Must add: if task status='in_progress' AND elapsed > 300s, reset to 'pending' and re-execute. Add timeout field to track when task entered in_progress state. Test: create stuck task, verify it retries after 5 min timeout.
tasks.success_criteria: Stuck task (in_progress > 5min) resets to pending and re-executes; add test case to verify

tasks.title: P0: Wire quality score pipeline — executor → projects.json → dashboard
tasks.description: Quality metric completely broken: executor returns quality=85 but dashboard shows 0. Trace: agents/executor.py → orchestrator/main.py → orchestrator/projects_loader.py → dashboard/state.json. Add logging at each step. Ensure quality_score is normalized and persisted. Test: executor returns quality=85, verify it appears in projects.json AND dashboard/state.json.
tasks.success_criteria: Dashboard state.json shows quality > 0 for completed tasks; quality flows end-to-end

tasks.title: P0: Dashboard state writer — enforce schema validation
tasks.description: state.json has null/empty fields: quality, model, recent_tasks, changelog, research_feed. Writer must validate: (1) no null values allowed, (2) missing fields get defaults, (3) types validated. Test: attempt to write invalid state, verify schema correction.
tasks.success_criteria: state.json never has null/empty required fields; all writes pass schema validation

tasks.title: P0: Wire token enforcer module into orchestrator
tasks.description: Module exists (orchestrator/token_enforcer.py) but not connected to execution flow. Must wire: (1) Check is_rescue_allowed() before any rescue decision, (2) Deduct tokens on rescue, (3) Block rescue if limit exceeded (10% budget), (4) Log all decisions to reports/token_decisions.jsonl. Test: hit token limit, verify rescue is blocked.
tasks.success_criteria: Rescue decisions logged and budget-enforced; token limit blocks rescue when 10% exceeded

tasks.title: P0: System health check baseline — all 5 checks pass
tasks.description: Establish baseline: Verify orchestrator running, dashboard server alive, agents responsive, watchdog active, cron jobs executing. Create reports/system_health.json with results. Test: run each check independently, document expected values, add to CI/CD health monitoring.
tasks.success_criteria: 5/5 health checks pass; results logged to reports/system_health.json with timestamps

tasks.title: 🚨 EMERGENCY: Fix orchestrator/main.py hang (BLOCKING SYSTEM)
tasks.description: CRITICAL: orchestrator/main.py hangs indefinitely when called with --version 1 --quick 1. Multiple processes running and never completing. This blocks the full-loop cycle and prevents any tasks from executing. Must debug and fix immediately. Test: run 'python3 orchestrator/main.py --version 1 --quick 1' and verify it completes in <30 seconds without hanging.
tasks.success_criteria: orchestrator/main.py completes successfully with test tasks in <30 seconds; no hung processes; full-loop cycle completes end-to-end

tasks.title: 🚨 CRITICAL: Detect and restart stale agents (>10min inactive)
tasks.description: Executor and Architect stuck running stale tasks for 7+ hours. blocker_monitor doesn't detect stale states. Need to: (1) Detect agents with status != 'blocked' but elapsed_time > 600s, (2) Auto-restart stale agents, (3) Clear their task assignments, (4) Reset agent state.
tasks.success_criteria: Stale agents auto-detected and restarted. Executor and Architect tasks cleared and reset.

tasks.title: P0: Task dispatch broken
tasks.description: All 5 tasks pending, none executing. Orchestrator not picking up tasks from projects.json.
tasks.success_criteria: Issue resolved and verified

tasks.title: P0: Tasks not executing
tasks.description: No tasks executing (all pending). Orchestrator may not be dispatching tasks from projects.json.
tasks.success_criteria: Issue resolved and verified

tasks.title: Fix blocker_monitor stuck-state detection
tasks.description: Executor stuck in 'recovering' state for 6+ min not detected. Monitor only checks status='blocked'. Need to add elapsed-time check for stuck states.
tasks.success_criteria: Blocker monitor detects and fixes agents stuck > 5min in recovering state

projects.name: Production Upgrade: 49% → 95%+ Success (Opus 4.6 Replica)
projects.description: Complete overhaul to production-grade system with real-time dashboard, auto-execution, 95%+ success rate

tasks.title: 🚨 P0: Fix dashboard metrics (showing zeros)
tasks.description: Create metrics_aggregator.py to collect real values and push to dashboard. Dashboard currently shows 0 tokens, 0 quality.
tasks.success_criteria: Dashboard shows actual token usage, quality scores, latency

tasks.title: 🚨 P0: Fix task execution pipeline
tasks.description: Create task_dispatcher.py. Pending tasks in projects.json not being executed. Dispatcher should load pending tasks and trigger agent execution.
tasks.success_criteria: Pending tasks auto-execute from projects.json

tasks.title: 🚨 P0: Fix executor success rate (49% → 95%)
tasks.description: Implement error_analyzer.py to identify failure modes. Currently at 49%, need 95%+. Debug top 3 failures, implement fixes.
tasks.success_criteria: Executor success rate > 95% consistently

tasks.title: P1: Implement persistence layer (no crons)
tasks.description: Remove all cron jobs. Implement persistent task queue, agent state, transaction log. All scheduling internal to daemon.
tasks.success_criteria: No external crons, all state persists across restarts

tasks.title: P1: Real-time dashboard updates
tasks.description: Create dashboard_sync.py. Update dashboard on task START/COMPLETE immediately.
tasks.success_criteria: Dashboard updates within 1 second of task status change

tasks.title: P1: Agent auto-execution framework
tasks.description: Implement internal task loop in each agent. Auto-pick pending tasks from projects.json every 5 sec.
tasks.success_criteria: Agents auto-execute pending tasks without dispatcher

tasks.title: P2: Quality pipeline (Opus-level routing)
tasks.description: Route tasks to highest-quality agents. Implement quality scoring (0-100), thresholds, quality gates.
tasks.success_criteria: Tasks routed to highest-quality agents, 95%+ quality maintained

tasks.title: P2: Parallel task execution (up to 4 concurrent)
tasks.description: Implement parallel executor. Resource-aware, dead-letter queue for failures.
tasks.success_criteria: 4 tasks execute simultaneously without resource exhaustion

tasks.title: P2: Self-improvement loop
tasks.description: Auto-tune agent prompts based on failure patterns. Auto-scale agents.
tasks.success_criteria: Agents improve success rate without manual intervention

tasks.title: P2: Network mesh Opus-level enhancements
tasks.description: Real-time health monitoring, predictive load balancing, automatic failover, network consensus.
tasks.success_criteria: Automatic failover works, load optimally distributed

tasks.title: P2: Complete automation (zero manual intervention)
tasks.description: Auto-detect tasks every 10 min, auto-execute, auto-commit, auto-push, auto-merge.
tasks.success_criteria: System runs 24/7 without manual intervention

tasks.title: P2: Dynamic sub-agent management
tasks.description: Spawn/kill agents dynamically. Max 4-8 sub-agents. Auto-distribute tasks.
tasks.success_criteria: Sub-agents spawn on high load, kill when idle

tasks.title: P3: Comprehensive test suite
tasks.description: Test execution pipeline, retry logic, failover, crash recovery, quality gates.
tasks.success_criteria: All tests pass, 95%+ coverage of critical paths

tasks.title: P3: Performance validation (24-hour test)
tasks.description: Benchmark latency, success rate, quality, uptime. Verify 99.9% availability.
tasks.success_criteria: >95% success, <5s p95 latency, 99.9% uptime

metadata.mission: Beat Opus 4.6 with 90% local / 10% Claude rescue
